findings.description: The sequence diagram image referenced in the source (`../_images/04/DbAccessSpec_StatementSequence.jpg`) is not included in s4. Section s1 includes the class diagram image using the same pattern, but the sequence diagram for the processing flow is absent.

The DbAccessSupport constructor is documented as `DbAccessSupport(Class<?> clazz)` in the knowledge file, but the source specifies `DbAccessSupport(Clazz<?> clazz)`. The parameter type name was changed.

The hints for s3 are missing method names from the DbAccessSupport methods table (first column): `getParameterizedSqlStatement`, `countByStatementSql`, `countByParameterizedSql`, `search`. These are all present in the section content but absent from hints.
findings.source_evidence: Methods table in DbAccessSupport (f) サポートクラス section listing: getParameterizedSqlStatement, countByStatementSql, countByParameterizedSql, search
